task: Implement the memory recall pipeline: hybrid seeding, bi-temporal masked PPR, epistemic weighting, community-summary fallback, and add-only valid-time invalidation.

items.acceptance_criterion: Recall extracts anchors from the query and seeds from a deduplicated union of lexical/fulltext-style and vector-style candidates over memory atoms. Queries naming two entities seed both with nonzero mass; unanchored broad queries route to summaries.
items.verification: `cargo test -p theorem-harness-runtime` passed; `recall_stage0_seeds_named_entities_from_union` proves a query naming Alpha and Beta gives both memory atoms nonzero seed mass. MCP adapters now expose native fulltext/vector search hooks, with deterministic runtime fallbacks.

items.acceptance_criterion: Recall runs PPR over memory edges filtered by valid_at <= query_time and (invalid_at is absent or invalid_at > query_time), with the interval treated as half-open.
items.verification: `cargo test -p theorem-harness-runtime` passed; `recall_stage1_masks_edges_by_half_open_valid_time` proves a fact is reachable before invalid_at and excluded at invalid_at.

items.acceptance_criterion: Supports, derives, and cites propagate rank; contradicts and tension are returned as result flags instead of corroborating mass; confidence and positive fitness affect ranking.
items.verification: `cargo test -p theorem-harness-runtime` passed; `recall_stage2_flags_contradictions_without_propagating_them` and `recall_stage2_adds_trust_flag_for_single_source_cluster_support` prove contradiction flagging, non-propagation, confidence-weighted support, and narrow-source trust flags.

items.acceptance_criterion: Broad or unanchored recall returns community-summary nodes rather than raw atoms, and generated summaries are two-level graph nodes with provenance links to members.
items.verification: `cargo test -p theorem-harness-runtime` passed; `recall_stage3_routes_broad_queries_to_two_level_summaries` proves broad recall returns only `community_summary` documents and includes summary levels 1 and 2.

items.acceptance_criterion: Memory edges carry valid_at and invalid_at valid-time fields; invalidation writes invalid_at and retains the edge; retrieval bumps salience; contradiction-based belief revision can invalidate superseded support.
items.verification: `cargo test -p theorem-harness-runtime` passed; `recall_bumps_salience_as_rehearsal` proves retrieval salience writes, and `contradiction_revision_invalidates_positive_edges_additively` proves invalid_at is written while the support edge remains live. `cargo test -p rustyred-thg-mcp` passed for the transport surface.
